title: Amazon CodeBuild Project
description: Represents an AWS CodeBuild build project with its source, environment, and build configuration.

name.description: The name of the build project.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the build project.

description.description: A description that makes the build project easy to identify.

source.description: Information about the build input source code.

type.description: The type of repository that contains the source code.

location.description: Information about the location of the source code.

buildspec.description: The buildspec file declaration to use for the builds.

gitCloneDepth.description: The depth of history to download.

image.description: The image tag or image digest that identifies the Docker image.

environmentVariables.description: A set of environment variables to make available to builds.

privilegedMode.description: Enables running the Docker daemon inside a Docker container.

serviceRole.description: The ARN of the IAM role that enables CodeBuild to access resources.

timeoutInMinutes.description: How long, in minutes, from 5 to 480, for CodeBuild to wait before timing out.

created.description: When the build project was created.

lastModified.description: When the build project's settings were last modified.
